creator: ooonea@gmail.com
text: Discovered the problem: it depends on switching to the latest repo of pkg. Made a "pk upgrade -f", also upgrades drm-kmod and gpu-firmware-kmod is installed; with an "pkg autoremove" gpu-firmware-kmod is removed and with that all firmware. By manually reinstalling gpu-firmware-kmod after "pkg autoremove", everything returns to normal. To whom could I report the issue of package dependencies in pkg?
